latestHandover: Initial audit complete. 7 findings across receptor-infra (2 High, 4 Medium, 1 Low). Phase 1 priorities: IAC-03-T1 (audit live Azure KV config), CI-02-T1/T2 (create Vault policy + role for Terraform CI). OIDC JWT/Vault credential pattern from cluster-sync.yml is the proven blueprint for Terraform CI. No long-lived Azure creds required.
